description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine cctswsomod_remove_2, and is implemented by a call to cctswsomod_remove_2. Use this API to remove an “other” type model attached to a switched shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.8.0. ierr = cctswsomod_remove(ibus, model)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Switched shunt bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Name of the model to be removed. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
